name: Deferred - Family Matter - 2
description: Second returns for family troubles and household burdens.

results.description: [money -60] The family matter from {origin} cost you hard coin before it loosened its hold.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [contact] Kin from {origin} left you with one more burden and one more person you could still call upon.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [social -1] The household trouble from {origin} touched your name in public before it ended.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [money -30] Family from {origin} required aid that you could not decently refuse and could not easily afford.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [contact] The matter from {origin} ended badly for comfort but well enough for blood to remain blood.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [social 1] You handled the family burden from {origin} with enough steadiness that others thought better of you afterward.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] The old household trouble from {origin} settled at last into memory and a sharper understanding of kin.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [money 20] What family demanded from {origin} later returned a little of its cost in land, goods, or gratitude.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [contact] A family matter from {origin} resolved into a kinship tie that remained useful and faintly exhausting.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [social -1] The household business from {origin} ended in compromise, explanation, and just enough embarrassment to linger.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [money -20] Family from {origin} took one more practical payment from you before the matter could be called closed.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp] The old family trouble from {origin} faded into one more duty survived rather than chosen.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [social 1] The burden from {origin} gave you a reputation for reliability that felt earned and not entirely welcome.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [contact] Family from {origin} remained a complication, but also became a resource more dependable than before.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [money -40] You finally paid the true cost of the family matter from {origin}, and its end felt more quiet than victorious.
results.name: family-matter-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] What family had asked of you since {origin} was finally answered, if not forgiven.
results.name: family-matter-2
